_provenance.variantRole: One captured trait amplified — elastic tile mosaic
_provenance.variantThesis: adobe.com as creative-product gallery. Asymmetric 4:3/16:9/1:1 photo tiles, hover-revealed background imagery with saturated overlays, intensified dark-section rhythm. Amplifies the trait the sr-homepage live fragment already underplays.
_provenance.amplifiedTrait: photography-led tile mosaics + elastic hover behavior (samples/live/snapshots/sr-homepage.html)

spacing._note: tileGridGap is variant-C-only; standard gridGap (8px) inherited from A applies elsewhere.

components.name: explore-card-mosaic
components.css: .ds-explore-card-mosaic { position:relative; } .ds-explore-card-mosaic__container { position:relative; border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden; aspect-ratio:4/3; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08); } .ds-explore-card-mosaic__link { position:absolute; inset:0; z-index:2; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:flex-start; padding:24px; text-decoration:none; background:transparent; } .ds-explore-card-mosaic__content { display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-between; height:100%; position:relative; z-index:1; } .ds-explore-card-mosaic__bg { position:absolute; inset:0; z-index:1; } .ds-explore-card-mosaic__bg img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; opacity:0; transition:opacity 400ms ease, transform 400ms ease; } .ds-explore-card-mosaic__container:hover .ds-explore-card-mosaic__bg img { opacity:1; transform:scale(1.04); } .ds-explore-card-mosaic__link::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.72) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.18) 55%, transparent 100%); opacity:0; transition:opacity 400ms ease; pointer-events:none; } .ds-explore-card-mosaic__container:hover .ds-explore-card-mosaic__link::before { opacity:1; }

components.name: photo-tile-feature
components.css: .ds-photo-tile { position:relative; overflow:hidden; border-radius:20px; } .ds-photo-tile--feature { aspect-ratio:16/9; } .ds-photo-tile__bg { position:absolute; inset:0; } .ds-photo-tile__bg img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; } .ds-photo-tile__overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:flex-end; padding:32px; color:#fff; background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 0%, transparent 60%); } .ds-photo-tile__eyebrow { font-size:16px; font-weight:700; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.64); margin-bottom:8px; } .ds-photo-tile__title { font-size:clamp(28px, 3.125vw, 48px); font-weight:900; line-height:1.05; letter-spacing:-1.2px; margin-bottom:16px; max-width:50ch; }

components.name: photo-tile-square
components.css: .ds-photo-tile--square { aspect-ratio:1/1; border-radius:12px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.04); display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-between; padding:20px; cursor:pointer; transition:background 400ms ease; } .ds-photo-tile--square:hover { background:transparent; } .ds-photo-tile--square .ds-photo-tile__bg { position:absolute; inset:0; opacity:0; transition:opacity 400ms ease; z-index:0; } .ds-photo-tile--square:hover .ds-photo-tile__bg { opacity:1; } .ds-photo-tile--square__icon { width:32px; height:32px; position:relative; z-index:1; } .ds-photo-tile--square__name { font-size:18px; font-weight:900; position:relative; z-index:1; color:#2c2c2c; transition:color 400ms ease; } .ds-photo-tile--square:hover .ds-photo-tile--square__name { color:#fff; }

components.name: mosaic-row
components.css: .ds-mosaic-row { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.5fr 1fr; gap:12px; } .ds-mosaic-row__feature { /* contains .ds-photo-tile--feature */ } .ds-mosaic-row__mnemonics { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:12px; } @media (max-width:767px) { .ds-mosaic-row { grid-template-columns:1fr; } .ds-mosaic-row__mnemonics { grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; } }

components.name: dark-band-section
components.css: .ds-dark-band { background:#000; color:#fff; padding-block:64px; border-radius:32px 32px 0 0; margin-top:-32px; /* visual overlap with previous section */ position:relative; z-index:2; } .ds-dark-band__eyebrow { color:rgba(255,255,255,0.64); } .ds-dark-band__title { color:#fff; }

defaultState.title: title-4 (24px / 900)
defaultState.body: body-md / rgba(255,255,255,0.72) on dark | rgba(0,0,0,0.72) on light

hoverState.gradientScrim: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.72) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.18) 55%, transparent 100%) opacity 0 → 1

rules: Every tile must have a captured photographic asset for the hover-reveal layer (Mode A image-reuse).
Default state shows the icon + name + body; hover reveals the photo behind the same content.
Same hover behavior across all tile aspect ratios (4:3, 16:9, 1:1).

mosaicHero.layout: 2-column grid: 1.5fr feature tile (16:9) + 1fr mnemonic group (2×2 of 1:1 tiles)
mosaicHero.featureTile: carries current campaign — eyebrow + title-3 headline + CTA overlay button
mosaicHero.mnemonicTiles: product mnemonic + product name; hover-reveals product imagery
mosaicHero.mobile: stacks vertically: feature tile full-width, then 2×2 mnemonics
rules: Replaces single-product hero on home + hub pages.
Single-product hero remains canonical on dedicated product landings (/products/<x>).
Maximum 4 mnemonics in the 2×2; rotate or paginate if more are needed.

darkBandRhythm.transitionPrimitive: 32px rounded-top corners + negative margin-top + z-index sequencing (samples' rounded-top section pattern)
darkBandRhythm.alternationPattern: white → mosaic-hero → dark-band → white → dark-band → white → dark-footer

divergence.amplifiedTraitSource: samples/live/snapshots/sr-homepage.html — the live fragment renders a color-saturated product-tile row + photo-led explore grid + dark testimonial band + dark product grid + Adobe wordmark. Variant C amplifies these traits which the captured live home (/) underplays.

anchors.implies: background image opacity 0→1 + scale(1.04) + gradient scrim 0→1 on 400ms ease
asymmetric tile grid with photographic surfaces + dark-band rhythm + product-grid-on-dark composition
16px-20px outer card / 12px inner / 32px section-transition / 999px pill — extended with tile-aspect-specific values

divergence.brand_faithful_inversions: inherits-from-A. Variant C adds no new inversions — the tile-mosaic amplification stays inside the captured color + type + radius vocabulary.

guards.name: stock-photography
guards.rationale: Mode A image-reuse contract — every tile uses captured Adobe imagery. No templated stock.

guards.name: padding-as-personality
guards.rationale: Variant C inherits A's section padding; the amplification is layout (mosaic) + interaction (hover), not spacing.

guards.name: B-but-more
guards.rationale: C amplifies a distinct trait from B (photography-led vs motion-led). Each is a defensible standalone proposition.

guards.name: size-as-personality (120pt+)
guards.rationale: Variant C explicitly down-sizes display copy in the mosaic context — title-3/title-4 max, never title-1. Type recedes; imagery leads.

guards.name: editorial-register-vocabulary-on-non-editorial-brands
guards.rationale: PRODUCT.md anti-references explicit. Mosaic ≠ magazine layout. C calls it 'creative-product gallery' to stay inside the brand register.

do: Photoshop (eyebrow) / Transform how you share information. (title-3 in feature tile)
Express (mnemonic tile name) — hover reveals a creator's-workspace photo
dont: 100-character feature claim crammed onto a 1:1 mnemonic tile (mnemonic tiles carry name only, not feature copy)
Title-1 display on a mosaic tile (use title-3 or title-4)

motion.noScrollGrow: Variant C does NOT use the scroll-grow hero (that's variant B's amplification). Hero is static-mosaic; motion energy lives in hover, not scroll.
motion.forbidden: inherits-from-A (no GSAP / no ScrollTrigger / no IntersectionObserver)

extensions.iaPriorities: inherit-from-A (commercial-conversion locked first-viewport, audience-routing locked nav, product-mnemonic-discoverability movable but C's mosaic hero directly surfaces this — locks ≥4 mnemonics in first viewport of home)

narrative.northStar: adobe.com as creative-product gallery — asymmetric photographic tiles, hover-revealed imagery, intensified dark-section rhythm. Photography leads; type recedes.
narrative.overview: Inherits A's tokens with three new tile-aspect radii (20px/16px/12px) and tileGridGap (12px). New components: explore-card-mosaic, photo-tile-feature, photo-tile-square, mosaic-row, dark-band-section. Hero is asymmetric mosaic (1.5fr feature 16:9 + 1fr 2×2 mnemonic 1:1) replacing single-product hero on home/hub pages. Hover-reveal background imagery on every tile. Minimum 2 dark bands per home/hub page with 32px rounded-top transitions. Title-1 not used in mosaic context (title-3/title-4 max). No scroll-grow hero (that's B).
keyCharacteristics: Asymmetric mosaic hero replaces single-product hero on home + hubs.
Hover-reveal background imagery is the primary micro-interaction.
Dark-band rhythm minimum: 2 dark surfaces per home/hub page.
Photo-led; type recedes (title-3/title-4 max in mosaic context).
Same motion baseline as A; no scroll-grow.
narrative.rules: inherits-from-A + mosaic-hero-canonical-on-home-and-hubs + every-tile-has-captured-photo + three-aspect-ratios-only + hover-reveal-required + ≥2-dark-bands-per-major-page + no-title-1-in-mosaic-context
dos: Hover-reveal background imagery on every tile.
Photo-led explore cards with text-link CTA on hover.
Dark band sections alternating with white via 32px rounded-top transitions.
Title-3 / title-4 max in mosaic context.
donts: Abstract gradient tile backgrounds (Mode A image-reuse).
